[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2022-03-24
[TITLE]: Moment school bus EXPLODES after bursting into flames as Scots pupils say they 'could have died'
[METADATA/INTRO]: THIS is the moment a Scots school bus exploded after bursting into flames on a motorway. We told this morning how emergency services raced to the scene on the A90 between Dundee and Perth after the alarm was raised over...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: She said: “It was really scary. 
 Read more on fire 
 “We had only been moving for a couple of minutes when the bus driver screamed ‘everybody off the bus’. 
 “Nobody knew what was going on until people started shouting fire. 
 “When I got downstairs I could smell smoke – there was smoke coming up through the seats at the back. 
 “It was only a minute from the bus stopping to it going up in flames. 
 “Luckily we were well clear of it when it exploded. 
 “The bus driver Dale was amazing by getting everyone off and keeping everyone calm.” 
 Scottish Fire and Rescue Service confirmed the bus was evacuated safely and there were no reported injuries.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2018-08-20
[TITLE]: Terrified passengers flee double decker First Bus as it burst into flames in Falkirk street
[METADATA/INTRO]: TERRIFIED passengers fled a double decker coach as it burst into flames. Firefighters raced to the scene in Allandale, near Falkirk, around 8.15pm tonight as the First Bus vehicle was engulfed....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: TERRIFIED passengers fled a double decker coach as it burst into flames. 
 Firefighters raced to the scene in Allandale, near Falkirk, around 8.15pm tonight as the First Bus vehicle was engulfed. 
 One local said: “I heard a loud noise and looked out my window. 
 “It looked as though there were about seven people upstairs rushing to get off. 
 “It was very scary, the whole of the back of the bus was ablaze. 
 MOST READ IN SCOTTISH NEWS 
 “Luckily the firefighters were here pretty quickly to put it out.” 
 Dramatic pictures show fire crews battling the blaze on the quiet Falkirk street.

[TITLE]: Fire engulfs double-decker bus on M27 motorway | London Evening Standard | The Standard
[METADATA/INTRO]: A double-decker bus has been engulfed by flames on a busy motorway. The M27 saw severe traffic between Portsmouth and Southampton on Thursday evening as firefighters rushed to tackle the blaze....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: A spokesman for Hampshire Fire and Rescue Services told the Standard: "Fortunately there we no casualties as the bus was well alight and heavy black smoke was emanating from the vehicle on the hard shoulder as crews arrived. 
 "The motorway was closed as firefighters extinguished the fire using jets and a compressed air foam system." 
 The incident was resolved just after 7pm. 
 Onlookers shared footage of the dramatic scene on social media. 
 One Twitter user wrote: “Just drove past big bus fire on #M27 on opposite carriageway with huge smoke. 
 “Back of bus burning and fire engines trying to get through traffic with no hard shoulder.
